summary: Comprehensive testing of pump.fun integration and liq/mcap ratio filters completed. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/tokens/scan returns tokens with source field (pump.fun or dexscreener)
Tokens with dexId=pumpfun or pumpswap correctly marked as source=pump.fun
Pump.fun bonding curve tokens (liquidity=0, dexId=pumpfun) bypass liq/mcap filters
Combined min and max liq_mcap_pct filters work correctly together
Default values min_liq_mcap_pct=0 and max_liq_mcap_pct=100 work correctly
Frontend Settings dialog shows Liq/MCap Ratio Filter toggle
Enabling toggle reveals Min Liq as % of MCap and Max Liq as % of MCap inputs
Frontend correctly passes min_liq_mcap_pct parameter when liq_mcap filter is enabled
Frontend displays PF badge (orange) for pump.fun sourced tokens
Token table renders correctly with all columns
Auto-refresh 30s countdown timer works (verified counting down)
Filter bar shows active filters including Liq>=X%MCap when enabled
Settings save and persist to localStorage correctly
Reset to defaults button works correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used live DexScreener API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pump.fun integration and liq/mcap filters fully tested. Backend returns tokens with source field (pump.fun or dexscreener). Tokens with dexId=pumpfun or pumpswap get source=pump.fun. Bonding curve tokens (dexId=pumpfun with 0 liquidity) bypass liq/mcap ratio filters. Frontend has Liq/MCap Ratio Filter toggle that reveals min/max percentage inputs when enabled. PF badge (orange) shown next to pump.fun tokens. Settings persist to localStorage.

GET /api/tokens/scan (bonding curve).verified: pumpfun bonding curve tokens bypass liq filters

frontend_test_results.footer_text: Data from DexScreener + Pump.fun • Not financial advice

features_verified: pump.fun integration as additional data source
min_liq_mcap_pct parameter (minimum liquidity as percentage of market cap)
max_liq_mcap_pct parameter (maximum liquidity as percentage of market cap)
Bonding curve token handling (bypass liquidity filters)
PF badge display for pump.fun tokens
Settings dialog with Liq/MCap toggle and min/max inputs
Filter bar showing active liq/mcap filter
